patterns.pattern: ^(\w+) delivers a terrible stroke with .+, scything straight through the magical shield surrounding (.+)\.$
^Lunging forward, (you) bring .+ down in a savage diagonal blow, carving through (.+)'s magical shield\.$
^(\w+) lunges toward (.+), but stumbles off balance as if expecting some barrier\.$
^(You) lunge toward (.+) with .+, but finding no resistance, you stumble hopelessly off balance\.$
^Drawing back .+, (\w+) unleashe?s? a flesh\-mincing blow at (.+)\.$
